query: SELECT tm.id, tm.name, tm.teamRole, tm.tenantId, t.name as tenantName FROM team_members tm JOIN tenants t ON tm.tenantId = t.id WHERE tm.name LIKE '%Zac%' OR tm.name LIKE '%Chrisman%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT tm.id, tm.name, tm.teamRole, tm.tenantId, t.name as tenantName FROM team_members tm JOIN tenants t ON tm.tenantId = t.id WHERE tm.name LIKE '%Zac%' OR tm.name LIKE '%Chrisman%';
